description: Perform a spatial join in gvSIG Desktop to count the number of cities per country. Add the populated places layer from /home/ga/gvsig_data/cities/ne_110m_populated_places.shp to the current project. Using the 'ne_110m_admin_0_countries' layer as the target, perform a spatial join that calculates the count of cities within each country. Export the resulting layer to /home/ga/gvsig_data/exports/countries_city_count.shp.
